name: Men's Slim Fit Chino Trousers
description: Classic slim-fit chinos in stretch cotton twill. Versatile trousers that work from office to weekend.

reviews.title: Perfect everyday trousers
reviews.reviewText: Well made with a clean cut that looks smart without being too formal. The stretch material makes them very comfortable for long days. I bought two pairs in different colours.

reviews.title: Good quality at a fair price
reviews.reviewText: Nice slim silhouette and the fabric has enough stretch to be comfortable sitting down. Sizing is accurate to chart. Only minor issue is slight creasing but easy to iron out.

reviews.title: Versatile and well-fitting
reviews.reviewText: Good cut and quality for the price. The chinos look great with both casual and smart-casual outfits. Fabric is durable and the colour stays vivid after washing.
